title: Set secure flag on cookies
description: Cookies created without the secure flag can be transmitted over unencrypted HTTP connections, exposing sensitive session data to eavesdropping attacks. This is especially critical for authentication and session management cookies.
recommendation: Always set the secure flag on cookies containing sensitive data to ensure they are only transmitted over HTTPS.

noncompliant.description: Cookies without Secure flag can be transmitted over unencrypted HTTP, exposing sensitive data.

compliant.description: Set Secure flag on sensitive cookies to ensure they are only transmitted over HTTPS.

checks.message: Set Secure flag on cookies when transmitted over HTTPS
